titleStmt.title: SII 19.131: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 131. (A.R. No. 234A of 1911.) KUMBHAKŌṆAM, KUMBHAKONAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. ON THE NORTH AND WEST WALLS OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, NĀGĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: The details of the date given in this inscription viz. 5th year, Āṉi, [śu.] 5, Mūla, Friday correspond to A.D. 975, June 16, ·85, but with two corrections: weekday being Wednesday and nakshatra Maghā.

This records a sale of land a quarter vēli in extent made by the Mūlaparuḍaipperumakkaḷ of Tirukkuḍamukkil to Mādēvan Kaṇḍi a servant-woman attached to the Kaṟṟaḷippirāṭṭiyār-Vēḷam at Tañjāvūr for 20 kāṣu which was endowed by her for the maintenance of a person who was to supply a pot of water from the Kāvēri river thrice every day for the sacred bath of the god. Kaṟṟaḷippirāṭṭiyār seems to be the same as the donor figuring in No. 95 above and probably diflerent from her namesake who was the wife of the Koḍumbāḷūr chief Bhūti-Vikramakēsari the subordinate of Sundara-Chōḷa Parāntaka II.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī— kopparakesaripanmarkku yāṇṭu 5Āvatu Ivvāṇṭānittiṅkaḷ mati nāṭapakkam pañcami nāḷ mūlattu kiḻamai veḷḷi poḻutu muṉcoṟkuṟi Ituvāṇṭitu tiṅkaḷitu pakkam titu poḻu tituparuvamāka vaṭakaraip pāmpūrnāṭṭut tevatāṉan tirukkuṭa mukkil mulaparaṭaipperumakkaḷoṅ keṭṭa nilavilaiyāvaṇan tanta Ivvūrk kuṟṟattut tañcārūrk ka
ṟṟaḷippirāṭṭiyār veḷattup peṇṭāṭṭi mātevan(ṅ) kaṇṭi tirukkiḻkkoṭṭat tup paramasvāmikku vaitta tirum(ā)ñcuṇattukku Ivaḷiṭaik koṇṭa kācu 2 10 Ikkācu Irupatuṅ koṇṭu Emperumāṉukkuk kāviriyiṉiṉṟum potu kala nir koṇṭu muṉṟu sandhi yun tirumañcaṉa niraṭṭuvāṉukku bhogamāka Āvaṇañ ceytu kuṭutta nilamāvatu kaḻaniyil Ariyalūp patiṟṟuveli
yil nāṉmāk kūṟiṭṭil Aḷantu kāṟ cey viṟṟukkuṭuttataṟ kellai kiḻpārkkellai Ipparamasvāmi nilattukkey meṟkkun teṉpāṟkkellai ṟukkey vaṭakkum melpārkkellaiyum parama tta ḻakku llaiyum paramasvāmik teṟkumāka I tta perunāṉkellaiyuḷḷaka Aḷantuvantapaṭi kāṟ ceyyum viṟṟu vilai
ñ ceytukuṭuttu Ik kācirupatu māvaṇakkaḷatte cellap poruḷaṟak koṇṭu can=tādittaval tirumañcaṉa muṭṭāme tiru Ikkācu Irupatum Emperumāṉ śrībhaṇḍara ttey vait poṉta svāmibhogamñ tirumañcana niraṭṭuvāṉukkuk kappaṭattukkuṅ ko kumāka In nilaṅ kālum Āvaṇañ ceytu vi
kkuṭuttom meṟcollappaṭṭa kaṟṟaḷippirāṭṭiyār veḷattup peṇṭāṭṭi ṇṭikku mūlaparaṭaipperumakkaḷom tuḷ ḷāvaṇakkiḻapu(va)ruḷ mulaparaṭaip perumakkaḷ paṇiyāl In nilavilaiyāvaṇa meḻutiṉeṉ Ivvūr Ūrkkaṇakkuc ceykinṟaThe inscription stops here.
Digital edition of SII 19.131 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
